evidence.quote: Melittin was dissolved in CD3OH to a concentration of 2.6 mM for NMR measurements, and pH of the solution was about 6.5 at room temperature. 3-trimethylsilyl-propionate (TSP) was mixed to the solution as the reference

issues.reason: Tool name is a generic abstraction not explicitly named in the text, though the action is described.

step_scores.fix_suggestion: Change tool name to 'Sample Preparation' or remove specific tool name to match text description.

evidence.quote: All the NMR measurements were conducted using a Unity Inova 500 MHz 1H NMR spectrometer (Varian Inc.)

1D 1H NMR spectra were acquired with a spectral width of 8,000 Hz, and free induction decay was accumulated 100 times with an acquisition time of 2.048 s and a relaxation delay time of 3.0 s... temperature range from − 5 to 60 °C

2D 1H 1H correlated spectroscopy (COSY) spectra were recorded in an absolute value mode using a field gradient pulse. A spectral width and data points were about 5,800 Hz and 512x1,024, respectively. Four scans were accumulated for each evolution time with a relaxation delay time of 4.0 s.

2D 1H 1H NMR spectra of total correlation spectroscopy (TOCSY) and nuclear Overhauser enhancement spectroscopy (NOESY) were acquired in a phase-sensitive mode with a hypercomplex method at 30 °C. The mixing times were 60 msec in the TOCSY spectrum and 300 msec in the NOESY one
the residues 2–11 and 13–26 adopt α-helices... [12]
processed on a PC using a commercial NMR data analysis soft-ware Nuts

exponential and sine-bell window functions were applied for the 1D and COSY spectra, respectively, and a square-cosine window function for the TOCSY and NOESY spectra... final digital resolutions of the 1D and 2D spectra were about 0.5 and about 4.0 Hz/point
The former method is called the α-proton (αH) chemical shift index (CSI)
dense distribution of the value − 1 from Gly3 to Thr10 and from Pro14 to Gln26 indicates that these regions adopt helix structures
Δδ/ΔT for each residue has been calculated by the linear least-squares method
Δδ/ΔT's for the residues 5–26 except 6 and 14 are more positive than -6 ppb/°C

evidence.quote: The helical structure evaluated from the methods, hence, agrees nearly with the known helix structure
determined on the basis of the NOE data from 2D NMR experiments [12]

evidence.quote: The CSI's for D-Pro14 melittin in CD3OH at pH 5.2 and 4°C
The dense region of -1 between Ser18 and Gln26 is included in the helix region of the residues 16–26
All the NMR measurements were conducted using a Unity Inova 500 MHz 1H NMR spectrometer
The NH chemical shifts exhibit a linear variation against temperature
it is considered that the NH's in the residues 4 and 6–13 are involved in intra-molecular hydrogen bonds
The Δδ/ΔT's for alamethicin-A6 have also been evaluated by Yee et al. [17]
